design_philosophy: Premium Luxury Light Design (Hermès × Twitter × Apple Notes). Zero noise, absolute typographic clarity, and sophisticated silver metallic accents on a pristine white canvas.

logo_concept.color: Obsidian (#0A0A0A) with a subtle silver foil gradient hover state
logo_concept.layout: Symbol slightly smaller than x-height, tightly kerned wordmark

spacing_and_radius.spacing_scale: Tailwind default (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12)

motion.page_reveal: opacity 0 to 1, transform translateY(10px) to 0 over 600ms

post_card.container: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-[24px] p-5 hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-all duration-400 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)]
post_card.avatar_ring: p-[2px] rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F3F4F6] via-[#9CA3AF] to-[#F3F4F6]
post_card.action_bar: flex justify-between items-center mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-[#E5E5E5]/50
post_card.action_button: text-[#737373] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] rounded-full p-2 transition-colors
post_card.reactions_row: flex gap-1 bg-[#FAFAFA] rounded-full px-2 py-1 border border-[#E5E5E5]

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium text-sm hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary_silver: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F3F4F6] to-[#E5E7EB] text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#D1D5DB] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium text-sm hover:shadow-sm transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#737373] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors
buttons.text_link: text-[#0A0A0A] font-medium underline decoration-[#E5E5E5] underline-offset-4 hover:decoration-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors

inputs.text_field: w-full bg-[#FAFAFA] border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-[16px] px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A] focus:bg-white transition-all text-sm
inputs.composer: w-full bg-transparent resize-none text-lg placeholder:text-[#A3A3A3] focus:outline-none

desktop.grid: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 max-w-[1400px] mx-auto gap-8 px-4 lg:px-8
desktop.left_sidebar: lg:col-span-3 sticky top-0 h-screen py-8 flex flex-col justify-between
desktop.main_feed: lg:col-span-6 min-h-screen border-l border-r border-[#E5E5E5] pb-24

mobile.top_bar: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-14 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E5E5] z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-4
mobile.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E5E5E5] z-50 flex items-center justify-around pb-safe
mobile.center_fab: absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-14 h-14 bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-105 transition-transform
mobile.bottom_sheet: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 bg-white rounded-t-[32px] shadow-[0_-20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] p-6 transform transition-transform

page_blueprints.feed: Top bar fixed with blur. Stories bar sits below top bar, using silver avatar rings. Feed items have ample spacing (gap-6) and 1px hairline borders. Pull-to-refresh spinner is a minimalist silver ring.
page_blueprints.profile: Hero banner is a soft noise gradient or uploaded image with 30% white overlay. Avatar overlaps banner with pure white 4px border. Stats card uses Japandi minimalism (FAFAFA background). Heatmap uses silver/grey shades for streaks.
page_blueprints.composer_bottom_sheet: Opens with smooth spring physics. Large typography for input. Multi-image carousel shows images with 16px radius. Action bar at bottom has minimalist lucide icons.
page_blueprints.messages: Conversations list uses pure white with hover:bg-FAFAFA. Chat view has sticky header. Bubbles are #0A0A0A (sent) and #F3F4F6 (received) with 20px radius.
page_blueprints.communities: Grid layout (bento style) for communities. Silver borders, soft shadows on hover.
page_blueprints.auth: Split screen on desktop. Left side: subtle silver aurora gradient with brand symbol. Right side: minimalist form. Mobile: clean white screen, large serif welcome text.

iconography.style: Outlined by default. Filled ONLY for active states (e.g., active tab in bottom nav, liked heart)
iconography.brand_mark: Use the diamond (◆) in pure black, or apply the silver gradient via CSS text-fill-color for premium touch.

motion_choreography.page_load: Staggered fade-in (opacity 0->1, translateY 10px->0) with 50ms delay per feed item.
motion_choreography.hover_lifts: Card hovers move Y by -2px and increase shadow spread softly.
motion_choreography.ink_links: Underline scales from width 0 to 100% on hover, originating from left.
motion_choreography.reaction_burst: Clicking like triggers a micro-scale (0.8 -> 1.2 -> 1.0) and a subtle flash of the soft red/green accent color.

tailwind_classes.text_hero: font-display text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tighter text-[#0A0A0A] font-light
tailwind_classes.card_premium: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-[24px] p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
tailwind_classes.nav_item: flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors group

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
